sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42684" key="e(rpusth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑρπ-υστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a crawling child,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.302</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
